name: Bug Report

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment

- **GPU:** (e.g. RX 7800 XT)
- **VRAM:** (e.g. 16GB)
- **AMD Driver version:** (e.g. 23.12.1)
- **Windows version:** (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- **Python version:** (`python --version`)
- **torch-directml version:** (`pip show torch-directml`)
- **diffusers version:** (`pip show diffusers`)

## Command used

```bat
python scripts/generate.py --prompt "..." --model "..." [other flags]
```

## Full error output

```
Paste the complete traceback here
```

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Additional context

Any other info that might help (screenshots, other software running, etc.)
